name: LGB Forge Limited
summary: LGB Forge Limited manufactures and sells forged and machined components in India. The company offers auto, electrical, and transmission forged components to automobiles and non-automotive segments. Its products include hot forging products, such as sring seedle bottoms, VWH connecting rods, valve bonnets, brake flange forgings, rocker arms, sonalika and differential bevel pinions, and bucket tooths; and hot and warm forging products comprising bells, body starter clutches, tulips, and claws. The company also provides cold forging products, including ball pins, ball rods, boss rotors, fuel pump components, shafts, pinions, sleeves, and sockets, as well as pulleys, pleungers, and two wheeler gears. It also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
